ppo_infer|bf16|1|device.summary: PPO Policy Inference (batch-1 robot control) [device, bf16]: memory-bound. Raise arithmetic intensity — tile/block for L2 reuse, fuse elementwise ops, or increase batch so each byte does more FLOPs.

findings.recommendation: Raise arithmetic intensity — tile/block for L2 reuse, fuse elementwise ops, or increase batch so each byte does more FLOPs.

findings.observation: Host/CPU-bound: 34.0% of time outside GPU kernels.
findings.recommendation: Use HIP graphs to amortize launch, fuse kernels, or move host work off the critical path.
